# services.skydns

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.skydns`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.skydns.address` | `string` | Skydns address to bind to. |
| `services.skydns.domain` | `string` | Skydns default domain if not specified by etcd config. |
| `services.skydns.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable skydns service. |
| `services.skydns.etcd.caCert` | `null or absolute path` | Skydns path of TLS certificate authority public key. |
| `services.skydns.etcd.machines` | `list of string` | Skydns list of etcd endpoints to connect to. |
| `services.skydns.etcd.tlsKey` | `null or absolute path` | Skydns path of TLS client certificate - private key. |
| `services.skydns.etcd.tlsPem` | `null or absolute path` | Skydns path of TLS client certificate - public key. |
| `services.skydns.extraConfig` | `attribute set of string` | Skydns attribute set of extra config options passed as environment variables. |
| `services.skydns.nameservers` | `list of string` | Skydns list of nameservers to forward DNS requests to when not authoritative for a domain. |
| `services.skydns.package` | `package` | The skydns package to use. |
